creator: erik@tenku.dk
text:
Created attachment 242688
Patch for upgrade of port

Added various build options to port Makefile.
List of build options, newness and defaults:
  - MYSQL(new,off), PGSQL(new,off), PYROOT(new,on) ROOT7(on) SQLITE(new,off) X11(new,on)
  
Note: In previous versions of this port, the dependencies of MySQL, PgSQL, PyROOT, SQLite and X11 were all predicated by default
